title: The Account of the Murder [of 'Uthman
description: According to Abu Ja'far (al-Tabari): In this year, 'Uthman b. 'Affan was killed. We have mentioned many of the reasons that his murderers cited as an excuse for killing him, and we have avoided mentioning many others that should not be included here. We will now describe how he was killed, how and through whom it began, and who was the first to treat him audaciously before he was murdered. According to Muhammad b. 'Umar al-Wagidi-'Abdallah b. Ja'far-Umm Bakr bt. al-Miswar b. Makhramah-her father: 323. A variant version of Qur'an 6:160.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
